test:
  name: 02_VOL_XAUUSD_1H_VOLEXP_TRENDFILT_S06_V1_P00
  family: VOL
  strategy: 02_VOL_XAUUSD_1H_VOLEXP_TRENDFILT_S06_V1_P00

  broker: OctaFX
  timeframe: 1h
  session_time_reference: UTC

  start_date: 2024-01-02
  end_date: 2026-02-28

  description: Normal+high, stop2.3, exit14

symbols:
  - XAUUSD

indicators:
  - indicators.structure.ema_slope
  - indicators.structure.highest_high
  - indicators.volatility.atr
  - indicators.momentum.rsi
  - indicators.volatility.volatility_regime

execution_rules:
  pyramiding: false
  entry_when_flat_only: true
  reset_on_exit: true

  entry_logic:
    type: intersection
    condition: ema_slope_50_up_AND_three_lower_closes_AND_break_hh2_shift1
    lookback_bars: 2
    atr_length: 14

  exit_logic:
    type: dynamic_or_time
    price_exit: rsi2_above_85
    time_exit_bars: 14

  stop_loss:
    type: atr_multiple
    atr_multiplier: 2.3

  trailing_stop:
    enabled: false

order_placement:
  type: market
  execution_timing: next_bar_open

trade_management:
  direction: long_only
  reentry:
    allowed: false

volatility_filter:
  enabled: true
  required_regime: 0
  operator: gte
